acceptedGaps: Fails component thresholds; remaining differences are text/font rasterization, border antialiasing, and full native button template fidelity.
inspection.toleranceReason: Native-quality promotion is blocked because the latest triptych still fails strict crop thresholds.
inspection.notes: Reviewed latest native Windows, macOS runtime, and diff crops. Button remains not-evaluated: crop dimensions and provenance are ready, but changed pixels and MAE remain above threshold, dominated by Helvetica fallback text metrics, antialiased border identity, and native template details.

knownGaps: Button chrome is approximated; native pressed, hover, and template visuals remain gaps.

inspection.toleranceReason: Native-quality promotion is blocked because the latest triptych still fails strict crop thresholds.
inspection.notes: Reviewed latest native Windows, macOS runtime, and diff crops. ToggleButton remains not-evaluated: checked state identity is improved and crop dimensions match, but changed pixels remain above threshold with visible text/font and template-edge differences.

knownGaps: ToggleButton checked and disabled chrome is approximated; native pressed, hover, and template visuals remain gaps.

acceptedGaps: Helvetica text fallback differs from native Segoe UI.
Only the default checked light-state crop is covered; unchecked, indeterminate, disabled, hover, focus, and keyboard states remain outside this promotion.
inspection.toleranceReason: Strict crop thresholds pass and manual triptych inspection finds only bounded default-state gaps; grade is limited to good because broader state/interaction coverage is not present.
inspection.notes: Promoted to nativeQualityGrade good after reviewing native Windows, macOS runtime, and diff crops. The checked box footprint, tick, label inset, crop dimensions, provenance, and diff metrics support a bounded native-quality good grade for this default checked light-state row.

knownGaps: CheckBox glyph and checked state chrome are rendered approximately; indeterminate, focus, and full template visuals remain gaps.

knownGaps: RadioButton glyph and checked state chrome are rendered approximately; focus, group keyboarding, and full template visuals remain gaps.

acceptedGaps: Default-font evidence still fails component thresholds after underline removal and centered text placement: fallback Helvetica metrics leave HyperlinkButton at 18.75% changed pixels against the 18% threshold. Repo-external Segoe UI evidence passes at 13.95%, so the row remains environment-dependent pending default-font parity or explicit reviewer acceptance. Navigation, visited, focus, disabled, high-contrast, and full native template behavior remain out of scope for this default-state crop.
inspection.toleranceReason: Native-quality promotion is blocked because the latest triptych still fails strict crop thresholds.
inspection.notes: Reviewed latest native Windows, macOS runtime, and diff crops. HyperlinkButton remains not-evaluated: centered text placement closes the repo-external-font strict crop, but default-font evidence still fails the changed-pixel threshold due to fallback text/font rasterization and residual link-template fidelity gaps.

knownGaps: HyperlinkButton emits visible centered link text; navigation behavior, visited state, focus visuals, disabled/high-contrast states, automation invoke state, and full native template visuals remain gaps.
